allow: Bash(grep -rn "shopperClaimed" src/routes/*.ts app/../app/src/components/NotificationsModal.tsx 2>/dev/null | head; grep -rn "shopperClaimed" /c/Users/joaki/repos/veckis/app/src/components/NotificationsModal.tsx /c/Users/joaki/repos/veckis/backend/src/routes/notifications.ts 2>/dev/null | head -8; ls src/routes/ | grep -i notif)

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(30\); do { $h = docker inspect veckis-db-1 --format "{{.State.Health.Status}}" 2>$null; if \($h -eq 'healthy'\) { break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); Write-Host "db: $h")

PowerShell($b = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($b\) { Stop-Process -Id $b -Force }; Write-Host "backend killed: $b")

PowerShell($m = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($m\) { Stop-Process -Id $m -Force }; Write-Host "metro killed: $m")

PowerShell(foreach \($port in 5000, 55291\) { $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if \($p\) { $p | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "port ${port}: killed $p" } else { Write-Host "port ${port}: tom" } })
Bash(powershell -Command "if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { 'backend: UP' } else { 'backend: DOWN' }")
Bash(powershell -Command "if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { 'serve: UP pa 5000' } else { 'serve: DOWN' }")

Bash(grep -n "showPaste\\|parsing ?\\|{parsing\\|handleParseAndCreate\\|pasteText" src/../app/recipes/index.tsx 2>/dev/null | head; grep -rn "showPaste" app/recipes/index.tsx 2>/dev/null | head; grep -n "showPaste\\|{parsing\\|parsing &&\\|handleParseAndCreate\\|onPress={handleParse" app/recipes/index.tsx | head -20)
Bash(cat app/../src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx 2>/dev/null | head -60 || cat src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,60p')

PowerShell($h = docker inspect veckis-db-1 --format "{{.State.Health.Status}}" 2>$null; Write-Host "db: $h"; $b = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host \("backend: " + $\(if \($b\) { "UP" } else { "DOWN" }\)\); $m = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host \("metro: " + $\(if \($m\) { "UP" } else { "DOWN" }\)\))
